tool: Ferman (2021) Table 1 (published) + clean-room solve.QP identity draw
targets_crosscheck: aggregated the authors' supplementary results.csv (40,000 rows = 5,000 reps x 8 (J,T0) cells); reproduces every Table 1 SC cell to <= 0.001. Supplement referenced, not redistributed.
identity_draw: factor-model DGP (Ferman main.R) at NumPy seed 12345, J=10, T0=20; weights from R solve.QP algorithm (Goldfarb-Idnani) via quadprog 0.1.13 == aux.R synth_control_est

packages.quadprog: 0.1.13 (build-time only; not used by the case)

notes: mlsynth's outcome-only VanillaSC (BilevelSCM('outcome-only')) reproduces the identity-draw solve.QP weights to 6.6e-11 and is bit-identical to a full VanillaSC.fit(). The Monte-Carlo cells run mlsynth's own solver over the paper's grid (200 reps/cell, seed 47).
